purpose: Tamper-evident SHA-256 fingerprint of the canonical sorted-deduplicated exported-symbol set in crates/frankenlibc-abi/version_scripts/libc.map. Any silent addition or deletion of an exported libc.so symbol fails one of the two cited fingerprints with the live hex visible alongside the frozen value.
regeneration_note: If a planned ABI change adds/removes/renames symbols, update total_export_count, blocks_count, exports_sha256, and block_names_sha256 atomically with the version_script change. Do NOT update one without the others; mismatch is itself a fail-closed signal.
